items.title: Gordon Haskett upgrades Booking Holdings ahead of earnings, calls AI fears overblown
items.description: Gordon Haskett's $5,440 price target implies that shares of Booking Holdings could surge 28% from here.

items.title: Daiwa upgrades Palantir on AI demand, strong commercial revenue guidance
items.description: Daiwa's $180 price target implies that shares of Palantir could rally 26% from here.

items.title: Tuesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.description: Traders bought up tech shares Monday, lifting the S&P 500 for back-to-back gains. The Dow Industrials also hit fresh intraday and closing records.

items.title: Big Tech's gigantic AI spending plans are spooking investors. But history shows that's when you want to buy
items.description: The recent pullback in megacaps could prove a buying opportunity so long as the companies' growth remains attractive.

items.title: Three software earnings reports this week could trigger a bounce, says Jay Woods
items.description: Investor and trader Jay Woods breaks down the week ahead for Pro subscribers.
